facebook.caption:
6,090 reviews. 4.3 stars. Chuồn Chuồn Bistro & Bar keeps showing up for a reason.

Sit-down meals on Trần Hưng Đạo for $15-30 a head. Cold drinks, solid food, and a crowd that keeps coming back.

If your Phu Quoc itinerary still has a dinner slot open, this one fills it well.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
